---
title: "Project Page"
---

## My github
- [Github](https://github.com/Catefishh)

## Key projects

::: {.project-grid}

::: {.project-card}
### [Stock price predictor](https://github.com/Catefishh/Stock-price-predictor)

This was my first project using machine learning. I trained an LSTM model to make future stock price predictions.
:::

:::
